name: hey-codex
description: Delegate selected tasks to a separate Codex CLI invocation when explicitly requested.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to a separate Codex CLI run only when explicitly asked
interface.longDescription: Invoke a second Codex CLI process for isolated read-only analysis, review, suggestions, or carefully scoped full-auto runs only when the user explicitly asks.
defaultPrompt: Invoke a separate Codex CLI process for an isolated second opinion, read-only analysis, or carefully sandboxed full-auto edit only when the user explicitly asks for it.
Run a read-only Codex review on the current branch.
Delegate this task to another Codex process only because I am explicitly asking for it, then summarize the result.
